name: multi-agent-harness
description: Skills shipped by the multi-agent-harness project.

plugins.name: author-workflow
plugins.description: Author a Starlark multi-agent workflow (loops, conditionals, data-driven fan-out, verify-repair, budgets, verdicts) and run it with `harness workflow run-script`.

plugins.name: author-goal
plugins.description: Create or advance a Goal in the harness: write the description / design / real-acceptance markdown, accumulate a knowledge ledger, run multi-agent exploration, and move the goal through its lifecycle (manual gated stages and the knowledge-driven phased model executed by `harness goal run-phases`).

plugins.name: author-planner
plugins.description: Decompose an explored Goal into an executable plan: an ordered list of sequential phases, each owning a task DAG where tasks with disjoint owned_paths run in parallel. Covers `harness goal plan`, the phase/task shape it produces, and how the plan feeds the phase→Starlark compiler and `goal run-phases` orchestrator.
